description_long: This guard rail is constructed from solid wood, featuring two horizontal rails with a natural, slightly irregular shape that mimics hand-hewn timber. The vertical posts at each end are thick and robust, providing sturdy support and a rustic appearance. The wood grain is clearly visible, with a warm brown finish that highlights the natural texture and color variations of the material. The rails are not perfectly straight, giving the structure a handcrafted, organic look. The ends of the posts are squared off, and there are no visible fasteners or metal components. The overall design is simple yet functional, suitable for use in parks, rural roadsides, or decorative urban settings.
description: A rustic wooden guard rail with two uneven horizontal rails and thick, squared posts, finished in a warm brown wood grain. The design is sturdy and natural, with visible wood texture and no metal parts.
description_view_0: Side view showing the thickness of the vertical post and the narrow profile of the rails.
description_view_1: Front view displaying both horizontal rails and the full width between the two vertical posts.
description_view_2: Opposite side view, similar to view 0, highlighting the post's thickness and rail profile.
description_view_3: Rear view showing the rails and posts from the opposite direction, mirroring the front view.
